name: Cutely Chaotic
description:
Honestly, sometimes, I wish I had Chikn’s positive energy and silly way of thinking. I think everyone could use that sometimes.

That’s where this bot comes in.

That’s right, this is another transformation scenario from me, but this time you’re turned into Chikn Nuggit. Because why not, right?

(By the way, if this bot does well, I was considering making transformation scenarios on Iscream, Hawt Saus, Onyn Ring, and Sassparilla as well, but only if anyone else also wants them.)
creator: SacredSean
